title: Performance Optimization
description: Tips to keep your app fast and smooth.

slides.title: Optimization Tips ⚡
slides.content:
# Performance Best Practices

* Use `const` constructors where possible – reduces rebuilds.
* Use `ListView.builder` for long lists – lazy loading.
* Avoid rebuilding large widgets unnecessarily – use `Consumer`/`Selector` in Provider.
* Cache images with `ImageCache` or use `CachedNetworkImage`.
* Use `RepaintBoundary` for complex animations.
* Profile with Flutter DevTools.

quizData.question: What is the benefit of using `const` constructors?

options.text: They allow widget reuse and reduce rebuilds

quizData.explanation: Const widgets are canonicalized and Flutter can reuse them, improving performance.

slides.title: Using const
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use the Flutter DevTools

The performance view shows widget rebuilds and frame rendering times – invaluable for finding bottlenecks.
